title: Mardo Rainbow
description: PVP-focused texture pack Various tweaks were given to create more flair and personality.
body:
**Mardo Rainbow**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- This texture pack has various changes from the default texture pack including but not limited to swords, potions, and more. A highlight of the texture pack is its FabricSkyBox skies in the overworld and end & the ability to help out pvpwise! ---
**What the pack looks like** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vT3tJ1Bv/images/74093cdf5453cfbfde344d94588e822168a676b9.png)
--- for more detail This texture pack gives Minecraft a cleaner and more modern look while still keeping the game feeling familiar. It updates a wide range of default textures, including items, particles, and other small details that make the whole game look smoother. One of the biggest features is the FabricSkyBox skies in both the overworld and the end. The overworld sky looks more alive and colorful, and the end has a completely new atmosphere that makes exploring or fighting the dragon feel way more dramatic. On top of the skies, there are plenty of quality-of-life tweaks that players usually end up loving. The totem is smaller so it doesn’t block half your screen, and your hands become smaller when you're not holding tools or weapons, which makes the first-person view look cleaner. Shields are lowered so they don’t constantly get in the way during PvP or survival. The pack also includes a rainbow XP bar that looks way more fun than the default one, and purple hearts that stand out nicely without being distracting. Block textures are cleaned up too, giving everything a smoother and more polished look. Overall, this pack is perfect if you want Minecraft to feel upgraded, vibrant, and a bit more stylish while still staying true to the original game. have any questions? need help? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!** updated the summary description profilepic tags and version
